info.title: Stripe
info.description: The Stripe REST API. Provides programmatic access to Customers, Charges, and related billing primitives.

bearerAuth.description: Use your secret API key as a bearer token.

get.description: Retrieves a Customer object given its unique identifier.

parameters.name: customer
parameters.description: The identifier of the customer to be retrieved.

get.description: Returns a list of your customers. The customers are returned sorted by creation date, with the most recent customers appearing first.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: A case-sensitive filter on the list based on the customer's email field.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: A limit on the number of objects to be returned, between 1 and 100.

parameters.name: starting_after
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination. An object ID that defines your place in the list.

parameters.name: ending_before
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination. An object ID that defines your place in the list.

200.description: A paginated list of Customer objects.

get.description: Retrieves the details of a charge that has previously been created.

parameters.name: charge
parameters.description: The identifier of the charge to be retrieved.

get.description: Returns a list of charges you've previously created. The charges are returned in sorted order, with the most recent charges appearing first.

parameters.name: customer
parameters.description: Only return charges for the customer specified by this customer ID.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: A limit on the number of objects to be returned, between 1 and 100.

parameters.name: starting_after
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

200.description: A paginated list of Charge objects.

post.description: A webhook endpoint must have a url and a list of enabled_events. This endpoint is for internal account configuration and should not be exposed to agents.

get.description: List sources for a specified customer. This is a legacy/internal endpoint superseded by Payment Methods.

parameters.name: customer
parameters.description: The ID of the customer whose sources will be retrieved.

parameters.name: object
parameters.description: Filter sources according to a particular object type.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: A limit on the number of objects to be returned, between 1 and 100.

200.description: A paginated list of source objects.

post.description: Creates a new tax_id object for a customer.

parameters.name: customer
parameters.description: The ID of the customer the tax ID will be added to.

post.description: Use this endpoint in the Stripe Connect OAuth flow to obtain an access token. Internal connect plumbing; not for agent use.

delete.description: You can also delete webhook endpoints via the webhook endpoint management page of the Stripe dashboard. Internal admin operation.

parameters.name: webhook_endpoint
parameters.description: The ID of the webhook endpoint to delete.

post.summary: Create a refund for a charge
post.description: Capture or refund the payment of an existing, uncaptured or captured charge.

parameters.name: charge
parameters.description: The identifier of the charge to refund.

post.description: Administrative endpoint to permanently close a connected account. Restricted internal admin operation; must be hidden from agents.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: The ID of the connected account to close.
